{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {

    "R1.6": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,

    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The review provides a detailed analysis of the text's structure and suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is polished, with improvements made to several problem paragraphs.",
    "RX.1": "The review flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('first NMT system…') and marks confidence and missing evidence for other recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in suggesting changes to the original text without providing justification or citing sources.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.7,

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.5: The review provides a detailed analysis of the text's structure and suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is polished, with improvements made to several problem paragraphs.
rationale.RX.1: The review flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('first NMT system…') and marks confidence and missing evidence for other recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in suggesting changes to the original text without providing justification or citing sources.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
